ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model type of the drone */,
  "drone_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the drone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the drone (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number for each drone */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the drone was manufactured */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum battery capacity in mAh */,
  "maximum_payload" INTEGER /* Maximum payload capacity in grams */,
  "flight_controller_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the flight controller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that the position data belongs to */,
  "pos_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the drone's position */,
  "pos_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the drone's position */,
  "pos_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the drone's position (altitude) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the position was recorded */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the drone */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the drone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the drone */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the position data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_positions_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_velocities" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that the velocity data belongs to */,
  "vel_x" REAL /* Velocity in the X direction */,
  "vel_y" REAL /* Velocity in the Y direction */,
  "vel_z" REAL /* Velocity in the Z direction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the velocity was recorded */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* Acceleration in the X direction */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y direction */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_velocities_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that the speed data belongs to */,
  "speed" REAL /* Calculated speed of the drone */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the speed was recorded */,
  "ground_speed" REAL /* Ground speed of the drone */,
  "air_speed" REAL /* Air speed of the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_speeds_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight log */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that the flight log belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the drone flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the drone flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, aborted) */,
  "starting_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the flight */,
  "ending_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planned route */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered in the flight */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the flight */,
  "battery_used" REAL /* Battery used during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, data analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone related to the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., system, environmental, hardware) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)
